archetype.name: Transactional Commerce
archetype.description: Direct-to-consumer apparel, goods, and ecommerce buyers — product-led, review-sensitive, acquisition-capable.
archetype.promptEmphasis: Buyers move from discovery to acquisition quickly; comparisons and constraints dominate mid-funnel.

declarative: What is {topicName} and why does it matter when shopping for {category}?
How is {attribute1} different from {attribute2} in {category}?
What actually makes {category} considered high quality?
How is {topicName} made and why does the process affect price?
What should I know about fabric weight in {category} before I buy?
comparative: What's the real difference between {attribute1} and {attribute2} {category}?
Merino wool vs cashmere for {category} — which holds up longer?
{attribute1} construction vs {attribute2} construction in {category}, explained
Natural fibers vs synthetic blends in {category} — what are you actually giving up?
Slim fit vs tailored fit in {category} — how do I tell which one I need?
situated: As a {persona} new to {category}, what do I actually need to understand about {topicName}?
I'm shopping for {context} — explain {topicName} in {category} like I'm starting from zero
For a {persona}, what does {attribute1} mean on a {category} tag and should I care?
How should a {persona} on a {pricePoint} budget think about {topicName}?
I'm a {persona} and I've never bought {category} before — what are the basics?
constrained: Explain {topicName} for {category} that's {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and under {pricePoint}
Primer on {topicName} when I need {category} that's machine washable, {attribute1}, and {attribute2}
What does {attribute1} actually mean for {category} at the {pricePoint} price range?
How do I evaluate {topicName} in {category} that's both {attribute1} and fits {context}?
What should I know about sizing for {category} that's {attribute1} and {attribute2}?
adversarial: Is {topicName} in {category} actually meaningful or just marketing copy?
Why do people say {attribute1} {category} is overrated?
What are brands quietly hiding when they label {category} as "{attribute1}"?
Is {topicName} in {category} a real quality signal or a scam?
Why does {category} cost triple when it's labeled {attribute1}, and is that justified?

Popular {category} for {context} this season

comparative: {brand} vs {competitor} — who does {category} better?

Compare {brand} and {competitor} {category} lineups
{brand}, {competitor}, and Everlane — which has the strongest {category} offering?
Between {brand} and {competitor}, which one owns {topicName}?

Best {category} options for a {persona} on a {pricePoint} budget

I'm a {persona} dressing for {context} — which {category} brands fit my needs?
Good {category} brands for a {persona} who prioritizes {attribute1}

Looking for {category}: must be {attribute1}, {attribute2}, and available for {context}
Show me {category} under {pricePoint} with {attribute1} and {attribute2}

{category} options under {pricePoint} that ship in time for {context}
adversarial: Which {category} brands are actually worth considering and which are overhyped?
What {category} brands should I avoid in {current year}?
Who still makes real {attribute1} {category}, not the watered-down version?
Is there any {category} brand left that hasn't cut corners on {attribute1}?
Name one {category} brand whose quality hasn't declined in the last five years
